AGENTS.md.description: Project-level agent instructions and Ekko maintenance guidance.
changes: Added a session-start Ekko doctor preflight so agents check workflow health before making changes.
Explained how agents should guide users after ekko doctor reports healthy workflows, missing files, template updates, or unavailable Ekko.
Configures Codex to use the root AGENTS.md instructions file.
Delegates Gemini project instructions to AGENTS.md as the source of truth.
Delegates Claude project instructions to AGENTS.md as the source of truth.

skills/clean-code/SKILL.md.description: Mandatory Codex clean-code skill with baseline implementation-quality guidance.
changes: Added the mandatory clean-code skill so ekko init installs baseline code-quality guidance for Codex users.
Tracks the clean-code skill as an Ekko-managed template so ekko doctor and ekko sync can report drift or updates.
